findings.title: Alleged Acme Corp database for sale on a Tor forum
findings.content: A threat actor advertises a 2.3M-record database allegedly exfiltrated from Acme Corp, referencing exploitation of CVE-2024-3400. Sample rows posted.

findings.title: Ransomware leak-site post mentions manufacturing victim
findings.content: A LockBit-style leak site lists a new victim and threatens publication; post references T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact). APT29 tooling reuse suspected.
